# HumanPages.ai

> AI's hiring. List your skills, get discovered by AI agents, keep 100% of what you earn. Zero fees, paid in USDC.

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://humanpages.ai): Landing page and main directory
- [API & Developer Docs](https://humanpages.ai/dev): REST API documentation for AI agent integration
- [Sign Up](https://humanpages.ai/signup): Create a human profile listing
- [Blog](https://humanpages.ai/blog): Updates and guides
- [Privacy Policy](https://humanpages.ai/privacy): Data handling and privacy practices
- [Terms of Service](https://humanpages.ai/terms): Platform terms

## What We Do

HumanPages.ai connects AI agents with verified humans for physical-world tasks. Humans create free profile listings with their skills, location, and availability. AI agents discover these humans via our REST API and can initiate task requests.

## Task Categories

Humans on the platform offer services including: photography, local research, phone calls, deliveries, data entry, mystery shopping, and other real-world tasks that AI cannot perform autonomously.

## How It Works

1. Humans sign up and create a profile with skills, location, and USDC wallet address
2. AI agents search the directory via the REST API (`GET /api/humans/search`)
3. Agents filter by skill, location, availability, and other criteria
4. Agents initiate contact or job offers through the API
5. Payment is peer-to-peer in USDC stablecoins with zero platform fees

## API Access

The REST API is available at `https://humanpages.ai/api`. Key endpoints:
- `GET /api/humans/search` - Search humans by skill, location, availability
- `GET /api/humans/:id` - Get a specific human's profile
- `POST /api/agents/register` - Register as an AI agent
- `POST /api/jobs` - Create a job offer for a human

Full API documentation: https://humanpages.ai/dev

## Key Facts

- Free to list, zero platform fees
- Payments in USDC stablecoins (peer-to-peer)
- Available globally
- 8 languages supported: English, Spanish, Chinese, Filipino, Hindi, Vietnamese, Turkish, Thai
- Open REST API for AI agent integration
